name: Ceramic Table Lamp Tan - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Illuminate your home in modern style with the Ceramic Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This table lamp features a white fabric empire shade and a tan ceramic base for an artistic, mixed-material look. Designed with a socket turn knob rotary switch, the lamp has a one-way light setting for easy on and off. Place it in your living room or any other space to add a touch of stylish illumination.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
